summary: Google Books API v1 at www.googleapis.com/books/v1 supports public volume search/metadata workflows and OAuth-protected My Library bookshelf operations.

auth.instructions: Public requests without an OAuth 2.0 token must send an API key via the key query parameter. For user bookshelf operations under /mylibrary/*, obtain user OAuth consent and send Authorization: Bearer <token> with scope https://www.googleapis.com/auth/books.

endpoints.name: search-volumes
endpoints.description: Searches public Google Books volumes. Requires q; if no OAuth token is provided, include API key in key query parameter.

endpoints.name: get-volume
endpoints.description: Retrieves metadata for a specific volume ID.

endpoints.name: list-my-bookshelves
endpoints.description: Lists bookshelves in the authenticated user's My Library account (OAuth required).

endpoints.name: list-my-bookshelf-volumes
endpoints.description: Lists volumes in an authenticated user's bookshelf by shelf ID (OAuth required).

endpoints.name: add-volume-to-bookshelf
endpoints.description: Adds a volume to an authenticated user's bookshelf; requires https://www.googleapis.com/auth/books scope.

endpoints.name: remove-volume-from-bookshelf
endpoints.description: Removes a volume from an authenticated user's bookshelf.
